prompt: Retouch this food photo taken with an iPhone to look like a professional food pictorial. Apply cinematic lighting, enhance the colors to look deep and rich, and increase the sharpness to bring out the texture and details of the food. Create an atmosphere like a high-end restaurant, making the background slightly dark and naturally blurred to make the food stand out. Add a small, subtle text with a natural hand-drawn feel on one side. Make it a stylish and high-quality food photo style for Instagram.
